$comment: Merge snippet — add these entries to your existing hooks in .claude/settings.json. Do NOT replace your entire settings file with this.

PostToolUse.description: Audit telemetry: captures tool calls, agent spawns, code changes
Eval telemetry: runs tests and lint after .py file changes

PreToolUse.description: Agent versioning: snapshots changed agent definitions
Audit directives: reads pending directives from the Audit Director
